transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_PRODUCTS_FIN_KEY_TA
transformation_chain.description: To load the product_key from N_GL_REV_MEASURE into the interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT GL.PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_GL_REV_MEASURE_TA  GL,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE GL.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
GROUP BY 1

transformation_chain.name: SQ_WI_PRODUCTS_FIN_KEY_TA1
transformation_chain.description: To load the unmatched Product_Key between INV and Keys table from N_INV_REV_MEASURE into the Interim keys table

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT INV.PRODUCT_KEY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_INV_REV_MEASURE_TA  INV,$$STGDB.WI_TAXAUDIT_DT_CNTRL WTADC
WHERE INV.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=WTADC.TAXAUDIT_PREVIOUS_YEAR_INT
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_PRODUCTS_FIN_KEY_TA  WI_KEY WHERE INV.PRODUCT_KEY=WI_KEY.ITEM_KEY)
GROUP BY 1

SELECT 
   RP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,
   RP.BASE_PRODUCT_ID,
   RP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE, 
   RP.PRODUCT_STATUS_CODE,
   RP.PRODUCT_DESCRIPTION,

   RP.CISCO_FINISHED_PROD_TYPE_CODE,

   RP.RU_OS_TYPE_CODE, 
   RP.RU_OS_FEATURESET_NAME,
   RP.RU_OS_FEATURESET_DESCRIPTION,

   RP.RU_SERVICE_BRAND_CODE,
   RP.RU_SERVICE_LEVEL_GROUP_CODE, 
   RP.RU_GSP_STATUS_CODE,
   RP.RU_GSP_TYPE, 
   RP.RU_BK_SERVICE_PROGRAM_ID,
   RP.PRODUCT_SUBGROUP_DESCRIPTION, 
   RP.PRODUCT_TYPE_ACTIVE_FLAG,

   RP.BUSINESS_UNIT_ACTIVE_FLAG,
   RP.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_CODE, 
   RP.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_DESCRIPTION,

   RP.ITEM_KEY,
   RP.RU_OS_SOFTWARE_ROLE, 
   RP.PRODUCT_FAMILY_TRGT_LEAD_TIME,

   RP.EDW_UPDATE_DTM, 
   RP.EDW_UPDATE_USER,

   RP.NEW_PRODUCT_FLG,
   RP.PRODUCT_PRICING_CATEGORY_CD, 
   RP.FIRST_CUSTOMER_SHIP_DT,
   RP.SERVICEABLE_PRODUCT_FLG, 
   RP.DV_ITEM_TYPE_CD,

   ,RP.RU_TENTATIVE_FIRST_CUST_SHP_DT

    /*Commented as part of XAAS Q1FY16

   */
   ,RP.RU_BKG_SRC_CD

   ,RP.RU_OFFR_MIDTRM_CHNG_ALLWD_FLG 
   ,RP.RU_END_DT_ALIGNMENT_FLG       
   ,RP.RU_PRICE_PROTECTION_FLG       
   ,RP.RU_RQST_SVC_STRT_WNDW_DAYS_CNT
   ,RP.RU_RQST_SVC_RNWL_WNDW_DAYS_CNT
   ,RP.RU_RYLTY_VENDOR_NAME          
   ,RP.RU_CHARGE_FREQ_CD             
   ,RP.RU_CHARGE_TYPE_CD

   ,RP.RU_RATE_EVENT_TYPE_CD         
   ,RP.RU_OPTIONAL_PREPYMNT_ROLE

   ,RP.PRDT_SETUP_CLASSIFICATION_CD

   /*q3fy15 changes end*/

   ,RP.TRUE_UP_TERM_DESCR

   ,RP.BASE_DISCOUNT_PCT_CD
   ,RP.PRICING_PRORATION_DUR_MTHS_QTY

   ,RP.ITEM_CATALOG_GROUP_CD

   ,RP.LICENSE_MODEL_NAME

 /*Added as part of Jan12 2017 rel */
 ,RP.ELA_FLG
 ,RP.XCAT_FLG
 ,RP.RECURRING_OFFER_FLG
   /*Added as part of XAAS Q3FY17*/
   ,RP.ANNUITY_SBSCRPTN_MODEL_TYPE_CD
   ,RP.SBSCRPTN_GSP_NAME

   /* End Q3FY17*/   
     /*Added as part of ATCCV Q3FY17*/
     ,RP.PRICING_UNIT_NAME
   ,RP.PRICING_UNIT_DURATION_INT
   ,RP.SBSCRPTN_MIDTERM_CHNG_ALWD_CD
 ,RP.MULTI_OA_BUNDLE_STATUS_CD
 /* XAAS-Q1FY18*/
 ,RP.RYLTY_PYMT_ASMNT_REQD_FLG 
 ,RP.THIRD_PRTY_ACTVTN_KEY_FLG

 ,RP.PRODUCT_CREATOR_ID
 ,RP.DV_PRODUCT_CREATOR_ID
 /* END-Q1FY18*/
 /* XAAS Q2FY18 */
 ,RP.CONTAINS_SUBSCRIPTION_CD
 ,RP.TERM_AND_PAYMENTS_MANDATORY_FLG
 ,RP.PAK_ELIGIBILITY_FLG
 ,RP.SK_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID_INT
    /* END Q2FY18 */
     /*ACV_RO Q3FY18*/
    ,RP.ACV_FLG 
    ,RP.ACV_WRKR_PRTY_KEY
    /* END ACV_RO Q3FY18*/
    ,RP.JIGSAW_ENABLED_FLG
    /*PID STANDARDIZATION */
    ,RP.BOOKING_POLICY_RULE_NAME
    ,RP.TCV_RECURRING_FLG
    ,RP.INCLUDES_SOFTWARE_FLG
    ,RP.TERMS_AND_CONTENT_CD
    ,RP.SW_ATR_CTD_BY_CSCO_WRK_PTY_KEY ,
       RP.SW_ATR_UPD_BY_CSCO_WRK_PTY_KEY ,
	   RP.SW_VALUATION_SPECIFICS_NAME   /* Annuity eGenie Q2FY19 Dec Rel changes */
	   ,RP.ATTR_PRDT_CLASS_NAME,
RP.SBA_FLG ,
RP.BUYING_PROGRAM_NAME,
RP.EA_NET_PRC_PRTCTN_MDL_NAME,
RP.EA_NET_PRC_PRTCTN_NAME,
RP.THIRD_PRTY_PRDT_ROYALTY_CD,
RP.PRODUCT_SOURCE_CD ,
COALESCE ( RP.FULL_STACK_USG_BASED_TECHN_NM,'UNKNOWN' ) FULL_STACK_USG_BASED_TECHN_NM,  /* Athena Q2FY22 Nov Rel changes */
COALESCE ( RP.FULL_STACK_USG_BASED_USE_CS_NM,'UNKNOWN' ) FULL_STACK_USG_BASED_USE_CS_NM,
COALESCE ( RP.CONSUMPTION_TYP_NM,'UNKNOWN' ) CONSUMPTION_TYP_NM ,
COALESCE ( RP.IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG,'N' ) IS_THIRD_PARTY_OFFER_FLG ,
COALESCE ( RP.THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM,'UNKNOWN' ) THIRD_PARTY_PROVIDER_NM,
RP.DV_SFTWR_SUBSC_ITM_CATGRZTN_NM,
RP.RENEWAL_FEE_TYP_NAME,
RP.ONE_TIME_CHARGE_TYPE_NAME,/*agannava:Q1FY23 nov SCOPE*/
RP.ONBOARDNG_SERV_PYMNT_MNTH_CNT,/*agannava:Q1FY23 nov SCOPE*/
COALESCE(RP.PROGRAM_INDICATOR_CD,'UNKNOWN')PROGRAM_INDICATOR_CD


   FROM 
   $$FINLGLVWDB.R_PRODUCTS_FIN_TA_WD0 RP,$$STGDB.WI_PRODUCTS_FIN_KEY_TA  WI_KEY
   WHERE RP.ITEM_KEY=WI_KEY.ITEM_KEY
